summary: Iteration 5: Verified rename + export bookmarks features end-to-end. Backend 28/28 pytest pass (5 new tests added for rename success/cascade-to-bookmark, rename empty-name 400, rename 404, export JSON structure, export empty). Frontend Playwright covered: hover-reveal pencil button, inline rename input with current name, Escape cancels, Enter renames, confirm button renames, bookmark cascade rename, toolbar updates to renamed name when file is active, Export Bookmarks button visible in Bookmarks tab triggers JSON download with correct schema {bookmarks, count, exported_at}, sort dropdown still functions. Docker files all present (docker-compose.yml, backend/Dockerfile, frontend/Dockerfile, frontend/nginx.conf, start.sh exec).
critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /api/files/{id}/rename does not validate filename uniqueness or extension - intentional based on MVP scope, acceptable.

exportBookmarks in AppContext.jsx uses browser anchor click pattern correctly; URL.revokeObjectURL called immediately after click - works but ideally wrapped in setTimeout for some browsers. Currently works in Chromium.
Bookmark cascade-rename uses db.bookmarks.update_many - correct since the model allows multiple bookmarks per file in schema even though create_bookmark enforces uniqueness.
FileList.jsx: rename input uses autoFocus but does not select-all; minor UX nit only.
Rename endpoint trims whitespace before empty check (good); rejects names that are only spaces with 400.
seed_data_creation: Seeded TEST_uirename.html + bookmark + TEST_other.html during UI run. Cleaned up via DELETE /api/files at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rename feature: pencil shows on file row hover -> data-testid='rename-file-{id}'. Click opens inline input data-testid='rename-input-{id}' with confirm 'rename-confirm-{id}' and cancel 'rename-cancel-{id}'. Enter or confirm button saves; Escape or X cancels. Backend cascades to bookmarks via update_many. Export: data-testid='export-bookmarks-btn' visible only when bookmarks.length > 0; triggers Blob download of bookmarks-export.json with {bookmarks, count, exported_at}. All 28 backend tests still pass.
